language.label: Language
lobby.title: Glass Bridge · Lobby
lobby.subtitle: Your nickname is shown to other players on the bridge in real time. (Spaces and special characters are shortened automatically.)
lobby.tip: Press Enter or the Join button to enter.
lobby.multiWaitAdmin: Waiting for the host to start the round. (No movement or hints)
lobby.multiRoundEnded: This round has ended. Movement is disabled until the host starts again.
lobby.connectError: Could not connect to the game server. Try again later or use Solo Play. (Please check that the server is running.)
hint.tip: The correct glass panel on the next row lights up for 1 second and is also revealed to other players.
admin.passwordSubtitle: Enter the password from your server config file.
admin.passwordError: Invalid password or could not reach the server.
admin.title: Multiplayer admin
admin.statsSortHint: Click a column header to sort ascending or descending.
admin.statsEmpty: End a round to see statistics here. (None while waiting to start)
admin.statsNoPlayers: No players were in the room when the round ended.
admin.tip: New rooms start in "waiting". Press Start round to let players move; End round freezes play and saves stats. Start again resets everyone.
